question: Objection Handling: 'They look scary/evil.' How do you flip this?
hint: Hearts of gold / Playful / Nordic Forest
text: I see someone saying they look scary. No bestie! Look closer. They live in a Nordic forest. Those sharp teeth? They are just grinning! They are super playful and actually have hearts of gold. Don't judge a book by its cover!

question: Sensory Sell: How do you prove it's a real Labubu using specific features?
text: You want to know if it's authentic? Count the teeth. One, two... exactly NINE teeth. And look at these upright pointed ears. He is the size of a house cat and ready to cause some cute chaos on your shelf.

question: Upselling: Why should they buy Zimomo (The Leader) over a regular Labubu?
text: Who is the boss of the forest? It's Zimomo! How do you tell him apart? Look at the back—he has a TAIL! Labubu doesn't have a tail. Zimomo is taller, stronger, and leads the pack. If you want the King, you need Zimomo.

question: Target Audience Pitch: Sell Mokoko to the 'Girly/Coquette' aesthetic fans.
text: Calling all my pink lovers! Mokoko is the Diva of the group. Look at that Heart-Shaped nose and the white belly. She loves attention and dressing up. If your vibe is soft and sweet, she is your spirit animal.

question: Storytelling: Make the 'Skeleton' character feel cute and relatable.
text: Don't be scared of the skull face! This is Tycoco. He looks like a skeleton just to scare away predators, but inside? He is a shy vegetarian! He's literally the softest boy in the group. He just wants to be safe.

question: Feature Highlight: Focus on the ears to create a 'Listener' persona.
text: Look at these massive ears! Pippo isn't just the master brewer of fruit wine; he's the best listener in the forest. Put him on your desk, and tell him your secrets. He's all ears—literally.

question: Correction: 'Is Labubu one guy?' (Educate the chat to show expertise).
text: Common mistake guys! Labubu isn't just one person's name. It's a whole TRIBE. There are over 100 elves in this species! That's why you see so many different colors and styles. You are collecting a whole population!
